title: CFTC staff details how crypto firms can use digital assets as derivatives collateral in new FAQ
snippet: The FAQ aligns the CFTC's framework with the SEC's recent haircut guidance, setting a 20% charge for bitcoin and ether and 2% for payment stablecoins.
